summary: Frontend testing of Q&A system, Review system, Vendor Registration, Affiliate Registration, and Footer links - All 10 features tested successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: Q&A modal implemented correctly with textarea and admin approval notice
Review modal has star rating selector (5 stars), title input, and textarea
Vendor Registration page has comprehensive business details form (Business Name, Phone, GST, PAN, Bank details, Address)
Affiliate Registration page shows benefits (10% commission, 30-day cookie, weekly payouts) and 'How It Works' steps
Footer links correctly configured - Find Doctors links to consult.ayushmednest.com
All modals show 'admin approval' message for user-submitted content
context_for_next_testing_agent: Q&A and Review systems working. Modals open correctly on product page. Vendor and Affiliate registration pages accessible without login. Footer links properly configured.

features_tested.1_question_modal_opens: PASS - Clicking 'Be the first to ask a question' opens modal with textarea
features_tested.2_review_modal_opens: PASS - Clicking 'Rate and Review Product' opens modal
features_tested.3_review_modal_star_rating: PASS - Modal has 5-star rating selector displayed
features_tested.4_vendor_registration_page: PASS - Shows form with Business Name, Phone, GST, PAN, Bank Account, IFSC, Bank Name, Address, City, State, Pincode
features_tested.5_vendor_registration_benefits: PASS - Benefits section shows: Access to millions, Easy product listing, Secure payments, Marketing support, Low commission
features_tested.6_affiliate_registration_page: PASS - Shows landing with benefits and 'How It Works' steps
features_tested.7_affiliate_benefits: PASS - Up to 10% Commission, 30-Day Cookie, Weekly Payouts displayed

additional_observations.q_and_a_section: Product page shows FAQ questions with expandable answers + 'Be the first to ask a question' button
additional_observations.ratings_and_reviews_section: Shows 'Be the first to Rate & Review this product' text + 'Rate and Review Product' button
additional_observations.admin_approval_workflow: Both question and review submissions require admin approval before display
additional_observations.non_logged_in_access: Vendor and Affiliate registration pages accessible without login (shows forms/landing)
additional_observations.footer_external_links: Find Doctors and Online Consultation both link to consult.ayushmednest.com with target='_blank'
